curation_notes: Patch commit 02e2a247 adds allowlist validation for aggregationType against AggregationType enum values and validates aggregateColumnName and aggregationTimestampColumnName against the model's known columns in the aggregateBy method of AnalyticsDatabaseService.ts. Only one source file was changed (not noisy). The vulnerability location was derived from the patch diff and confirmed by the advisory description which explicitly names the file and method.
